prompt:
Validate this checklist for launching a backend service to production and summarize the top missing controls.

Checklist:
- [x] Run database migrations in staging
- [ ] Define rollback plan and owner
- [x] Configure error alerting in Sentry
- [ ] Load test completed at expected peak RPS
- [ ] Document on-call escalation process
- [x] Backup and restore test completed
assertions: Response should include pass, warn, or fail style categorization.
Response should include at least one remediation recommendation.
